speaker: Seeker
text: Sharir toot raha hai, aur main bas chup ho jaati hoon. Dost ki shaadi miss ho gayi, par asli baat ye hai ki bapu ki seva aur apni dimaagi bimari ki goliyaan chhupate chhupate himmat hi khatam ho rahi hai.

strategy_intent: C7 context mein andar ki bebasi aur madad maangne ki sharm ko naam dekar emotional clarity dena.

text: Teen chhote options rakhte hain: (1) Roz sirf 5 minute bathroom ya chhat par jaa ke 10 dheemi saansein, bina kisi ko explain kiye. (2) Dawa ka time phone mein neutral naam se alarm lagao, jaise "paani". (3) Mummy ko ek safe line bolo: "thoda rest lekar theek ho jaungi", taaki tumhe har baar naya bahana na banana pade.

text: Ye safe line wali baat practical lag rahi hai. Alarm ko neutral naam dena bhi kar sakti hoon.

strategy_intent: Lens C se mummy ke bharose aur ghar ki maryada bachane ke liye concealment mirror karna.
text: Tum mummy ka bharosa aur ghar ki maryada bachane ke liye sar dard ka cover use kar rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, economic haal already tight hai, upar se agar maine bola toh kahenge natak kar rahi hoon. Yeh sunne ka darr sabse zyada hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue ke response mein short restatement se natak label ka chubhan mirror karna.
text: Tumhe sabse zyada yahi chubhta hai ki dard ko natak bol diya jayega...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul, isliye sacchai daba rahi hoon. Bas sochti hoon bacchon ka wellbeing aur ghar ka mahaul bacha rahe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se lagataar chalti suppression aur thakan ka duration mirror karna.
text: Kaafi time se tum apne dard ko hold pe rakhke sirf ghar chalane mode mein ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aur mujhe yeh bhi lagta hai ki mummy sochenge unki beti kamzor nikli. Ye thought hi tod deta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: C7 pressure mein invalidation ke neeche sharm aur helpless phansav ko naam dena.
text: Lagta hai tumhe sirf dard nahi, balki na-samjhe jaane ki chot bhi hai, aur saath mein help maangne par sharm ka bojh bhi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, na-samjhe jana hi sabse painful hai. Kabhi lagta hai meri baat ki value hi nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Seeker ke invalidation ko normalize karna aur social natak culture se context dena.
text: Jo tum feel kar rahi ho woh bilkul valid hai, khaaskar jahan mental struggle ko jaldi natak bol diya jata hai aur ghar ki maryada ka bojh bhi saath hota hai. Tumhari value kisi ke reaction se kam nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh sunke thoda halka laga. Kam se kam lag raha hai main overreact nahi kar rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens C se seeker ke respect-seeking need ko relationally mirror karna.
text: Tum bas itna chahti ho ki ghar mein tumhari baat ko imaandari se suna jaye, dismiss na kiya jaye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly, suna jaye. Main jhagda nahi chahti, bas mujhe jhootha na samjhein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ek baar common pattern share karke akelapan aur self-blame kam karna.
text: Bahut si women jinke ghar par financial pressure hota hai, woh yahi pattern follow karti hain — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolta nahi kyunki turant nakhre ya natak ka stamp lag jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, ab kya karoon practical level pe? Mujhe ghar ka balance bhi rakhna hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness signal par low-burden options dena jo daily routine mein fit ho.
text: Teen short options: (1) Roz 5 min quiet corner break lo. (2) Ek fixed line rakho: "aaj sar dard aur thakan zyada hai, thoda rest karke kaam karungi." (3) Dawa time ke liye neutral alarm naam rakh do.

speaker: Seeker
text: Fixed line mujhe kaafi useful lag rahi hai. Isse baar baar explain karna nahi padega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Chosen fixed-line strategy ko immediate step-by-step me convert karna.
text: Aaj yeh karo: pehle fixed line note par likho, phir ek baar normal awaaz mein bolkar practice karo, phir alarm set kar do. Bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Practice karke dekha, thoda control feel hua. Pehle sentence bolte hi gala bandh ho jata tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Dismissal fear ko structural stigma aur financial stress ke context mein reframe karna.
text: Jab ghar par paise ka pressure hota hai, log emotional baat ko jaldi practical ya natak category mein daal dete hain. Iska matlab tum galat nahi, context hi tough hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Context tough hai yeh line sunkar self-blame kam ho raha hai. Mujhe lag raha tha main hi problem hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Self-blame drop ko validate karna aur seeker ki dignity reinforce karna.
text: Tumne bahut honest tareeke se apni baat dekhi hai, aur yeh chhota shift bahut meaningful hai. Tum problem nahi ho, tum pressure mein bhi sambhal rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Phir bhi fear hai ki kisi din koi bol dega natak. Tab phir se sab hil jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue response mein short restatement dekar natak-trigger fear hold karna.
text: Tum darr rahi ho ki ek shabd phir se poora balance hila dega...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, exactly. Isi liye mujhe fallback line ready rakhni hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Trigger moments ke liye 2-minute fallback toolkit dena.
text: Fallback toolkit simple rakho: (1) 30 sec pause + 3 deep breaths. (2) Ek line repeat: "main explain nahi, pace choose kar rahi hoon." (3) Fir fixed line bolkar topic close.

speaker: Seeker
text: Pace choose kar rahi hoon wali line mujhe suit karti hai. Isse main defensive kam hoti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Next-day continuity ke liye one non-negotiable action lock karwana.
text: Kal subah ka ek non-negotiable kya rahega jo tum pakka karogi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Fixed line practice karungi aur alarm check karungi. Dono pakka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens B se seeker ki clear follow-through commitment mirror karna.
text: Tumne practical aur clear plan chun liya hai, aur wahi tumhari stability ka base ban raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab stable lag raha hai. Pehle jaisa helpless feel nahi ho raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Micro-consistency ka systemic reframe dena ki change repetition se aata hai, drama se nahi.
text: Aise situations mein progress bada jump se nahi, same chhote step repeat karne se aati hai. Tum wahi kar rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes, repeat karungi. Isse mujhe confidence aa raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Night close ke liye low-effort two-step routine suggest karna.
text: Raat ke liye bas do kaam: fixed line ek baar bolna, aur 5 slow breaths lena. Fir phone side rakhke rest.

speaker: Seeker
text: Done, yeh manageable hai. Main isko routine bana lungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Self-anchor statement finalize karane ke liye direct single question puchna.
text: Agar kal koi tumhari baat ko halka le, us pal tum khud ko kya yaad dilogi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main bolungi: meri baat valid hai, mujhe chillane ki nahi clarity ki zarurat hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Seeker ki self-validation line ko dignity aur steadiness ke saath reinforce karna.
text: Yeh line bahut powerful hai. Isme tumhari self-respect bhi hai aur ghar ka balance sambhalne ki maturity bhi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab kaafi halka feel ho raha hai. At least ab mujhe lagta hai main apni jagah se bol sakti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se de-escalation aur newly built voice ko steady close dena.
text: Aaj tum invalidation ke pain se nikal kar apni awaaz tak pahunchi ho, aur yeh daily practice tumhe isi tarah stable rakhegi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Dum ghutne lagta hai jab log normal baatein karte hain aur main phone kaat deti hoon. Saheli ne shaadi ki pics bheji toh maine bas hospital ka kharcha aur thakan bolke baat band kar di.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens C se parivaar aur image bachane ke liye social withdrawal mirror karna.
text: Tum parivaar ka mahaul bachane ke liye khud ko peeche kheench leti ho, chahe andar se dum ghut raha ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, community mein waise hi alag feel karti hoon. Agar dimaagi bimari ki baat nikli toh sab tamasha bana denge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue ke turant baad short restatement dekar tamasha-banane ka fear hold karna.
text: Tumhe lagta hai sach bolte hi log usse tamasha bana denge...

speaker: Seeker
text: Main adarsh beti aur maa dikhna chahti hoon, isliye andhere mein dawa le leti hoon. Kisi ko kuch pata na chale bas yahi sochti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se lambi chalti hidden struggle aur akelapan mirror karna.
text: Kaafi waqt se tum sabke saamne role nibha rahi ho aur asli struggle chupke carry kar rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sabse mushkil yeh hai ki main pehle hi akeli feel karti hoon. Upar se apni baat bolun toh lagta hai koi samjhega hi nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Repeated restatements ke baad core personal loss ko seeker ke words mein surface karwana.
text: Jab tum "koi samjhega nahi" sochti ho, us pal tumhare andar sabse zyada kya toot-ta mehsoos hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Lagta hai meri hi jagah khali ho gayi hai. Main sabke liye hoon, par mere liye koi nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: C7 context mein despair ke neeche isolation aur help maangne ki sharm ko naam dena.
text: Lagta hai tum bahut akeli aur phansi hui mehsoos kar rahi ho, aur help maangne par sharm ka bojh tumhe aur chup kar deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, phansi hui hi feel hota hai. Main chillana bhi nahi chahti, bas andar se khokli lagti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Seeker ke despair ko normalize karke community exclusion aur stigma reality se connect karna.
text: Jo tum mehsoos kar rahi ho woh bilkul valid hai, especially jab community mein pehle se distance ho aur mental health pe turant judge kiya jata ho. Is sab ke beech bhi tumhari keemat kisi image se kam nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh sunke thoda sambhali hoon. Par mujhe daily basis pe kaise handle karna hai, woh samajhna hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens C se seeker ki need mirror karna ki routine handle ho aur family balance bhi rahe.
text: Tum aisa tareeka chahti ho jisme tumhara daily load bhi chale aur parivaar ka balance bhi na hile.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, ab kya karoon practical batao. Main extra burden nahi le sakti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness par 3 short, low-obligation options dena jo existing duties mein fit ho.
text: Teen quick options: (1) Dawa alarm neutral naam se lagao, jaise "paani". (2) Roz 4 minute slow breathing while phone silent. (3) Calls pe fixed exit line rakho: "abhi hospital kharcha manage karna hai, baad mein baat karte."

speaker: Seeker
text: Fixed exit line ka idea strong hai. Isse mujhe instant panic mein words dhoondhne nahi padenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Selected fixed-line option ko step-by-step implement karwana for today.
text: Aaj ka mini plan: pehle exit line note mein likho, phir ek baar zor se padho, phir trusted contact ke naam ke saamne star mark kar do jinke call pe yeh line use karni hai. Bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh kar liya. Ab thoda control lag raha hai, warna call aate hi chest tight ho jaati thi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Social exclusion + stigma ko structural factor bata kar self-blame reduce karna.
text: Jab aadmi community se already cut-off feel karta hai, tab normal social interactions bhi threat jaise lagte hain. Yeh personal failure nahi, environment pressure ka effect hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Personal failure nahi sunke bahut relief mila. Main khud ko hi dosh de rahi thi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Self-blame drop ko validate karke seeker ki effort aur dignity reinforce karna.
text: Tum bahut himmat se isko dekh rahi ho. Role nibhate hue bhi tum apne liye space bana rahi ho, aur yeh bahut badi baat hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bas tamasha ka darr trigger ho jata hai kabhi bhi. Tab sab tool bhool jaati hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue response mein short restatement se sudden trigger fear contain karna.
text: Trigger aate hi tamasha ka darr sabse pehle aake pakad leta hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, exact wahi hota hai. Mujhe ek fast fallback chahiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Rapid-trigger ke liye 90-second fallback routine dena with no extra burden.
text: Fast fallback: 30 sec pause, 30 sec deep breathing, 30 sec line repeat "abhi sirf ek safe step". Fir exit line use karke call close.

speaker: Seeker
text: Safe step line mujhe yaad rahegi. Isse panic ke beech bhi direction milti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Agle 24 ghante ke liye one committed action nikalwana.
text: Agale 24 ghante ka tumhara one committed step kya rahega?

speaker: Seeker
text: Alarm aur exit line dono kal pakka follow karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens B se clear commitment mirror karke consistency reinforce karna.
text: Tumne bilkul clear, doable plan choose kiya hai, aur wahi tumhari stability ka base hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab main thodi stable feel kar rahi hoon. Pura theek nahi, par manageable hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Consistency ko nervous-system settling ke logic se explain karna.
text: Manageable feel aana hi first shift hota hai. Body ko repeat signal milta hai toh ghutan ka intensity naturally neeche aata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Repeat signal wali baat practical lagti hai. Main isko continue karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Raat ke close ke liye 2-step minimal routine dena.
text: Raat ko bas do steps: exit line ek baar read karo, phir 5 slow breaths. Iske baad phone side rakhke rest.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh main kar lungi. Isme extra kuch nahi hai, isliye realistic hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Self-anchor phrase finalize karke trigger moments mein carryover ensure karna.
text: Kal agar dum ghutna trigger ho, tum khud ko kaunsi line yaad dilogi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main bolungi: abhi sirf ek safe step. Baaki baad mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Seeker ki self-anchor line ko reinforce karke agency and continuity build karna.
text: Bahut grounded line hai. Isme panic ke beech bhi tumhara control aur self-respect dono bachte hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab halka lag raha hai. Akelapan abhi hai, par handle karne ka tareeka mil gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se de-escalation aur ongoing daily rhythm ko close par anchor karna.
text: Aaj tum ghutan aur despair se nikal kar steady pace tak aayi ho, aur yeh daily chhote kadam tumhe aage bhi sambhalte rahenge.
